# Logitech United States

Discover the innovative world of Logitech United States and shop workspace products like Keyboards, Mice, Webcams, Headsets, iPad Accessories, and more.

## Product Categories

### Mice
- [Mice](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/mice): Explore a variety of wireless and wired mice designed for different uses, including professional work and gaming. 
- [Gaming Mice](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/gaming-mice): High-performance mice tailored for gamers, featuring advanced sensors and customizable settings.

### Keyboards
- [Keyboards](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/keyboards): Explore a range of wireless and wired keyboards from Logitech for productivity and Gaming, featuring options like standard, mechanical, compact, and gaming keyboards.
- [Gaming Keyboards](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/gaming-keyboards): Keyboards designed specifically for gaming, offering features like customizable RGB lighting and programmable keys.

### Audio Devices
- [Headsets & Earbuds](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/headsets): Learn about Logitech's headsets and earbuds that deliver immersive sound experiences whether you're gaming, making work calls or streaming music.
- [Gaming Audio](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/gaming-audio): Specialized audio equipment designed to enhance the gaming experience.
- [Microphones](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/microphones): High-quality microphones for streaming, gaming, and professional use.
- [Speakers](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/speakers): A variety of speakers, including portable and home audio solutions.

### Webcams
- [Webcams](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/webcams): High-definition webcams for video conferencing and streaming.
- [Conference Cameras](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/conference-cameras): Cameras designed for conference rooms.

### Accessories
- [Accessories](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/accessories): Additional products to enhance your Logitech experience, including mouse pads and carrying cases.
- [Mouse Pads](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/gaming-mouse-pads): A selection of mouse pads designed for optimal performance and comfort.

## Product Series
- [MX Master Series](https://logitech.com/en-us/discover/c/master-series): Premium products that provide advanced features for productivity and comfort.
- [Ergo Series](https://logitech.com/en-us/discover/c/ergo-series): Ergonomically designed keyboards aimed at reducing strain during extended use.

## Specialized Products

### Gaming Gear
- [Logitech G](https://www.logitechg.com/en-us): A dedicated section for gaming products, including mice, keyboards, and headsets tailored for gamers.
- [Astro Gaming](https://www.logitechg.com/en-us/collections/astro-series.html): Premium gaming accessories and gear for serious gamers.
- [Simulation Gear](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/simulation): Equipment designed for simulation gaming, including racing wheels and flight sticks.

### Creative Tools
- [MX for Creatives](https://logitech.com/en-us/mx/mx-creatives): Tools and devices designed specifically for creative professionals.
- [Presenters and Digital Pens](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/c/presenters-and-digital-pens): Devices that enhance presentations and creative workflows.

## Business and Education Solutions
- [Business](https://logitech.com/en-us/business.html): Solutions tailored for business environments, including collaboration tools and professional-grade peripherals.
- [Education](https://logitech.com/en-us/education.html): Products and resources designed for educational institutions.

## Support and Resources

- [Support](https://support.logi.com/hc/en-us): Access to customer support for all Logitech products.
- [Individual Support](https://support.logitech.com/support): Tailored support options for individual users.
- [Business & Education Support](https://sync.logitech.com/hub/support): Specialized support for business and educational institutions.

## Company Information

- [Our Story](https://logitech.com/en-us/about): Learn about Logitech's history and mission.
- [Careers](https://logitech.com/en-us/careers): Explore job opportunities at Logitech.
- [Investors](https://ir.logitech.com/): Information for investors regarding Logitech's performance and strategy.
- [Blog](https://www.logitech.com/blog): Insights and updates from Logitech.
- [Press](https://news.logitech.com/): Latest news and press releases from Logitech.
- [Sustainability](https://logitech.com/en-us/sustainability): Logitech's commitment to sustainable practices.
- [Recycling](https://logitech.com/en-us/sustainability/recycling): Information on Logitech's recycling programs.
- [Accessibility](https://logitech.com/en-us/legal/accessibility): Logitech's efforts to ensure accessibility in their products.

## Legal and Privacy

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.logitech.com/en-us/legal/privacy-policy.html): Details on how Logitech handles user data and privacy.
- [Terms of Use](https://logitech.com/en-us/tos/terms): The terms governing the use of Logitech's products and services.
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.logitech.com/en-us/legal/cookie-policy): Discover the Logitech cookie policy to gain insights into the types of cookies Logitech use and how it is utilized.

## Additional Links

- [Deals](https://logitech.com/en-us/shop/deals): Current promotions and discounts on Logitech products.
- [Sitemap](https://logitech.com/en-us/sitemap): A comprehensive map of the Logitech website for easy navigation.
- [Logitech Status](https://status.logitech.com/): Real-time updates on product availability and service status.
